title: Man charged with DV murder after allegedly shooting Gold Coast mother who could ‘light up any room’
summary_full: Mallorie Jane Roberts, 23, found with gunshot wounds on Sunday evening with her partner arrested at the homeFollow our Australia news live blog for latest updatesGet our breaking news email, free app or daily news podcastA woman who died from gunshot wounds in an alleged domestic violence murder was “a beautiful young mother” who leaves behind a two-year-old son.Emergency services were called to a home on Loder Street in the Gold Coast suburb of Biggera Waters, in Queensland, at about 8pm on Sunday.
